parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ q: $json.q, limit: $json.limit || 3, chatId: $json.chatId || "", previousQ: $json.previousQ || "", previousIntent: $json.previousIntent || "", history: $json.history || [], lang: $json.voiceLang || "" }) }}
={{ JSON.stringify({ session: "default", chatId: $json.chatId, text: $json.text, linkPreview: true }) }}
